name: Easy Chocolate Pudding Recipe
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Sugar (more if you like it sweeter)
2 cups Milk (2% is good, not skimmed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan combine all ingredients except vanilla.
2. Over medium heat stir constantly and be patient as it thickens and comes to a boil.
3. Add vanilla and cook while stirring another minute or two.
4. Cool in the fridge uncovered for a few hours.
